---
title: "Plot Follicle"
jupyter: xenium
params:
  sample: "default"
  cell: "default"
  path: "."
format:
  pptx: default
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
#| include: false

sample = "default"
cell = "default"
path = "."
```

```{python}
#| include: false
from pathlib import Path

import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from matplotlib.colors import Normalize
import spatialdata
import spatialdata_plot

from timer import timer, write_timings_tsv

with timer("Setup"):
    roi = sample
    cell_id = cell
    # 'path' is the staged follicle-level zarr produced by subset_follicle.
    zarr_path = path
```

```{python}
#| include: false
with timer("Read zarr"):
    sdata = spatialdata.read_zarr(zarr_path)
```

```{python}
#| include: false
with timer("Locate oocyte"):
    oocyte_element = None
    outline_element = None
    oocyte_column = "_plot_follicle_oocyte"
    if "cell_boundaries" in sdata.shapes:
        outline_element = "cell_boundaries"
        boundaries = sdata["cell_boundaries"]
        if cell_id in boundaries.index:
            oocyte_element = "cell_boundaries"
            boundaries[oocyte_column] = "other"
            boundaries.loc[cell_id, oocyte_column] = "oocyte"
    if oocyte_element is None and "cell_circles" in sdata.shapes:
        if outline_element is None:
            outline_element = "cell_circles"
        circles = sdata["cell_circles"]
        if cell_id in circles.index:
            oocyte_element = "cell_circles"
            circles[oocyte_column] = "other"
            circles.loc[cell_id, oocyte_column] = "oocyte"

oocyte_found = oocyte_element is not None
if oocyte_found:
    print(f"Oocyte cell '{cell_id}' located in '{oocyte_element}'.")
else:
    print(f"Oocyte cell '{cell_id}' not found in cell_boundaries or cell_circles; plots will be rendered without a red outline.")
```

```{python}
#| include: false
with timer("List images"):
    image_keys = list(sdata.images.keys())
print(f"Images: {image_keys}")
```

```{python}
#| include: false
figure_specs = []
figure_dir = Path("plot_follicle_figures")
figure_dir.mkdir(exist_ok=True)

def _render_panel(img_key, ch, vmin, vmax, draw_all_cells, title, figure_path):
    plot = sdata.pl.render_images(
        element=img_key,
        channel=ch,
        cmap="gray",
        norm=Normalize(vmin=vmin, vmax=vmax),
    )
    if draw_all_cells and outline_element is not None:
        plot = plot.pl.render_shapes(
            element=outline_element,
            fill_alpha=0.0,
            outline_alpha=0.3,
            outline_color="yellow",
            outline_width=0.3,
        )
    if oocyte_element is not None:
        plot = plot.pl.render_shapes(
            element=oocyte_element,
            color=oocyte_column,
            groups=["oocyte"],
            palette=["red"],
            fill_alpha=0.0,
            outline_color="red",
            outline_width=0.5,
        )
    ax = plot.pl.show(
        title=title,
        figsize=(6, 6),
        coordinate_systems="global",
        return_ax=True,
    )
    ax.figure.savefig(figure_path, dpi=200, bbox_inches="tight")
    plt.close(ax.figure)


for img_key in image_keys:
    img = sdata.images[img_key]
    arr = next(iter(img.children.values())).image if hasattr(img, "children") else img
    for ch in arr.coords["c"].values:
        channel_name = str(ch)
        safe_channel = channel_name.replace("/", "_").replace(" ", "_")
        plain_path = figure_dir / f"{img_key}_{safe_channel}_plain.png"
        outlined_path = figure_dir / f"{img_key}_{safe_channel}_outlined.png"

        with timer(f"Plot {img_key}[{channel_name}]"):
            vmin, vmax = np.percentile(np.asarray(arr.sel(c=ch)), [1, 99.5])
            base_title = f"{roi} / {cell_id} — {img_key} — {channel_name}"
            _render_panel(img_key, ch, vmin, vmax, False,
                          f"{base_title} (oocyte)", plain_path)
            _render_panel(img_key, ch, vmin, vmax, True,
                          f"{base_title} (oocyte + neighbors)", outlined_path)

        figure_specs.append(
            {
                "image_key": img_key,
                "channel": channel_name,
                "plain_path": str(plain_path),
                "outlined_path": str(outlined_path),
            }
        )
```

```{python}
#| output: asis

for spec in figure_specs:
    intro = (
        f"The image shows a cropped view of `{roi}` centered on the oocyte "
        f"(cell ID `{cell_id}`), drawn from the `{spec['image_key']}` morphology image. "
    )
    plain_segmentation = (
        f"Shown in red is the default Xenium cell segmentation for the oocyte "
        f"(`{cell_id}`) the crop is centered on."
        if oocyte_found
        else f"The oocyte (`{cell_id}`) could not be located in the segmentation "
        "shapes, so no red outline is shown."
    )
    outlined_segmentation = (
        "Shown in red and yellow are the default Xenium cell segmentations: yellow "
        "outlines mark every neighboring cell in the crop, and red marks the oocyte "
        f"(`{cell_id}`) the crop is centered on."
        if oocyte_found
        else "Shown in yellow are the default Xenium cell segmentations marking every "
        f"cell in the crop. The oocyte (`{cell_id}`) could not be located in the "
        "segmentation shapes, so no red outline is shown."
    )

    print(f"## {spec['image_key']} - {spec['channel']} (oocyte)\n")
    print(
        intro
        + f"The `{spec['channel']}` channel is shown in grayscale, with intensities "
        "scaled to the 1st–99.5th percentile and the colorbar reporting the underlying "
        f"fluorescence values. {plain_segmentation} Axis units are global microns in "
        "the slide coordinate system.\n"
    )
    print(f"![]({spec['plain_path']})\n")

    print(f"## {spec['image_key']} - {spec['channel']} (oocyte + neighbors)\n")
    print(
        intro
        + f"The `{spec['channel']}` channel is shown in grayscale, with intensities "
        f"scaled to the 1st–99.5th percentile. {outlined_segmentation}\n"
    )
    print(f"![]({spec['outlined_path']})\n")
```

```{python}
#| include: false
write_timings_tsv("plot_follicle.timing.tsv")
```
